title: Harbour Housewares Rectangle Folding Trestle Table - 120cm (4ft) - White - Height Adjustable Outdoor Folding Table for Picnic, BBQ, Garden, Camping, Wedding
features: Multi-Functional & Adjustable: The Height Adjustable Folding Trestle Table offers flexibility with three height positions, making it ideal for a range of activities, from crafting at home to setting up at markets and fairs, all while maximizing comfort.

Durable & Long-Lasting: With its heavy-duty plastic top and robust tubular metal frame, this table provides exceptional stability, strength, and support for a wide variety of indoor and outdoor uses, ensuring lasting performance for years.

Easy Setup & Storage: The quick-fold design makes this table easy to set up and collapse for storage. With the added benefit of a rubber-coated carry handle, transportation is effortless, and space-saving storage is a breeze.

Generous Dimensions: The table measures 120cm (W) x 60cm (D) with adjustable heights between 50cm to 73.5cm (H), offering ample workspace for various activities. When folded, the table measures a compact 60cm (W) x 7cm (D) x 60cm (H).

Perfect for Any Occasion: Whether for crafting, hobbies, or hosting events, this table suits a wide range of uses and is the ideal solution for those needing portable, adjustable, and durable furniture for home, outdoor events, and more.
